note: fiawec.com live-component IDs. Race IDs harvested from the changeRace <select> on /en/page/resultats-1, category IDs from the bootstrap page's changeCategory <select> (2026-06-12) — categories are global entities, not per-race, and component responses ship the category select empty, so they must be curated here. Re-harvest if fiawec rebuilds its CMS — lib/results/wec.ts fails closed per round when an ID stops resolving.
